title: oxytropis campestris
intro: Oxytropis campestris, also known as mountain milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Oxytropis campestris include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
